text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's already budding? Can I come by later and
take photos? I want to add them to Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's fine with me. You're always taking photos
and videos, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want to make lots of records and
memories of my time here!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see you leaving likes on them too sometimes.
Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You should be thanking those impressive
photography skills of yours.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
By the way... Don't you want to buy a proper
camera?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, I have enough features on my phone camera,
and I want my photos to feel candid.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've taken lots of good ones recently! ♪
They're not on Umastagram yet!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Which one would you like to see? I've got a rare
six-leaf clover, Dober sleeping, my recent
favorite ramen, a video of Shakur typing...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Or how about the cute one I've got of you with a
ladybug on your shoulder? ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, when did you take that last one?
